entity.label: Jahaziel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Zechariah, a Levite of the family of Asaph (2 Chr. 20:14-17). He encouraged Jehoshaphat against the Moabites and Ammonites.

nodes.label: Jahaziel
nodes.description: The son of Zechariah, a Levite of the family of Asaph (2 Chr. 20:14-17). He encouraged Jehoshaphat against the Moabites and Ammonites.

nodes.label: Zechariah
nodes.description: A Levite of the sons of Asaph (2 Chr. 20:14).

verses.text: Then upon Jahaziel the son of Zechariah, the son of Benaiah, the son of Jeiel, the son of Mattaniah, a Levite of the sons of Asaph, came the Spirit of the LORD in the midst of the congregation;
